programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto
programme.desc: From a medieval hand-grenade to an extremely rare dinosaur, discover the secrets inside the Royal Ontario Museum.

programme.title: Victorian Farm
programme.desc: It’s the New Year and the farm needs emergency repairs. So the team go back to DIY basics, with the help of the woodsman, the blacksmith and the basket maker.

programme.title: Victorian Farm
programme.desc: It’s Spring and there are lambs and pigs to be delivered – which means Alex and Peter need to master animal midwifery. A prized ewe is in danger and a lame horse may jeopardise vital work on the farm.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Gandhi and Decolonization
programme.desc: Portrait of the man, his thinking and his passive struggle against the British presence in India.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Genghis Khan, the Empire of the Steppes
programme.desc: The kidnapping of his wife turned Temüjin into Genghis Khan.
programme.sub-title: Genghis Khan, the Empire of the Steppes

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Bouvines: France in Peril
programme.desc: The 12th and 13th centuries of our era are the stage for several conflicts between Capetians and Plantagenets.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: The Fall of Constantinople
programme.desc: April 1453. The Ottomans, led by Sultan Mehmed II, lay siege to the city of Constantinople.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: The Internet, the Origins of the Web
programme.desc: By standing out against the consumer society, Tim Berners-Lee made all this possible.
programme.sub-title: The Internet, the Origins of the Web

programme.title: Michael Jackson History-The King Of Pop 1958-2009
programme.desc: A retrospective of the life of the King of Pop by DJ Paul Gambaccini. Features an insight into his relationships with Elizabeth Taylor and Lisa Marie Presley and his untimely death.

programme.title: Final 24
programme.desc: Featuring archival footage, dramatic reenactments, and interviews with his family and closest companions, Final 24 documents the final moments of this rock star’s life.

programme.title: The Big Interview: Phil Collins
programme.desc: Legendary singer-songwriter, Phil Collins, sits down with Dan Rather to talk about his anticipated return to the music scene, his record breaking success and a possible future partnership with singer, Adele.

programme.title: Murder Rap: Inside the Biggie and Tupac Murders
programme.desc: Two of the most notorious unsolved cases in the history of American crime – the murders of rap stars Tupac Shakur and Biggie Smalls – have been the subject of exhaustive investigations, relentless speculation, and a web of conspiracy theories.

programme.title: Dr. Dre: Another Beat
programme.desc: Music producer, Apple executive and N.W.A. rapper recently announced that he would be releasing his first album since 1999, featuring guests such as Eminem, Kendrick Lamar, Ice Cube, Snoop Dogg amongst many others.

programme.title: The Big Interview: The Doobie Brothers
programme.desc: Still rockin’ down the highway after all these years, The Doobie Brothers take time for a backstage conversation about their incredible run.

programme.title: The Big Interview: The Doors
programme.desc: The two surviving members of The Doors, John Densmore and Robby Krieger, reminisce about their music, the sixties, and the life and death of Jim Morrison.

programme.title: Amy Winehouse & Me: Dionne's Story
programme.desc: Ten years after Amy Winehouse's tragic death, this documentary sees her goddaughter, Dionne Bromfield open up for the first time about the impact of Amy's death on her life.

programme.title: The Beatles: A Long and Winding Road
programme.desc: Follow the early Beatles as they work the club scene in Hamburg en route to their ultimate eternalized fame and influence.

programme.title: Pop Profiles: Daft Punk
programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to one of the most iconic pop stars of our time: Daft Punk. Daft Punk's story is told chronologically through their major hit singles. New interviews add insight into the life of Daft Punk.

programme.title: Pop Profiles: Whitney Houston
programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to one of the most iconic pop stars of our time: Whitney Houston. Whitney's story is told chronologically through her major hit singles. New interviews add insight into the life of Whitney Houston.

programme.title: The Big Interview: Daryl Hall
programme.desc: Hall of Fame singer Daryl Hall talks about his music career and his passion for restoring old homes.

programme.title: The Beatles: A Long and Winding Road: There Are Places I Remember (1940-1958)
programme.desc: An intimate retelling of the goings-on surrounding the four Beatles' upbringings and early pre-Beatles years.

programme.title: Video Killed the Radio Star: Billy Idol
programme.desc: Robert Elms and director David Mallet discuss Billy Idol. Topics include his music video contribution and influence during the early years of MTV. This episode features Idol's music videos from "White Wedding" and "Eyes Without a Face".

programme.title: The Big Interview: Rod Stewart
programme.desc: Rod Stewart is still rocking out fifty years into his career: he has a hit Las Vegas residency, continues to pack arenas around the world, and has a new album out. He's left his mark on rock & roll, and he talks to Dan Rather about his life and legacy.

programme.title: The Big Interview
programme.desc: The multi-talented artist talks about his music, his passion, acting and he shows off his extensive collection of sports memorabilia.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Roots of the Man
programme.desc: Robert Nesta Marley, known across the globe as Bob Marley, was the first and debatably only superstar ever to emerge from the third world.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: That's got to be them!
programme.desc: Sara and Jane return to a venue they investigated many years ago, this time with Phil and Dale. Phil and Sara have an anxious time in the basement, Dale and Jane are shocked by unexplained heavy footsteps, and don’t even mention the lift…or spiders.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Who's that?"
programme.desc: The team head to the East Midlands, to another overnight paranormal investigation. With reports of objects moving on their own, a cursed voodoo doll, and unexplained figures seen, will the team be able to shed any light on these mysterious incidents?

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Burning Betrayal
programme.desc: When 20-year-old Kim Antonakos disappears after a late night out in Manhattan, her father files a missing persons report.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Memphis Police have a prime suspect in the gruesome killings of two prostitutes. But as they prepare to make an arrest, psychic Carol Pate pays the cops a visit.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Rosa Talamantes
programme.desc: Can a psychic lead police to a body so they can convict a cold-blooded killer? Rosa Talamantes goes out for a drink with her boyfriend and never returns.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: What Lies Below
programme.desc: When popular high school student Robert Piest disappears after his shift at a local drugstore, police in Des Plaines, Illinois, ask psychic Carol Broman for help.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Margie Calciano
programme.desc: Detective Robert Wanner consults psychic Lauren Thibodeau to help with a case that has left him stumped. Surprisingly she instead offers clues on a cold case that’s been worrying Wanner for years.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Bad Company
programme.desc: A Vancouver area nightclub owner disappears into thin air. Police believe he’s fled the city, traveling incognito under one of his many known aliases.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Penney Serra
programme.desc: Twenty-one year old Penney Serra was brutally murdered in a parking garage. The police thought it was an open and shut case – witnesses had seen a suspect flee.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Home After Dark
programme.desc: Seventeen year-old Tyson Efird disappears from the parking lot of the grocery store where he works in Malvern, Arkansas.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Damage Done
programme.desc: When New Jersey single mother Nicole Arochas vanishes after a night on the town, her parents suspect the worst and file a missing persons report.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Lawrence Mbroh
programme.desc: Lawrence Mbroh was in a dangerous business - he sold drugs. So when he disappears, his father Alfred is worried. Detective Pam Gray is investigating the case but can find no new leads.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Taken By Storm
programme.desc: In the icy waters of the Atlantic off the coast of Maine, a lobster boat fails to return from a day of setting traps. With no Mayday, no word from the crew, the Coast Guard knows it has to act fact.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Baton Rouge
programme.desc: A serial killer is loose in Baton Rouge, police believe they’re looking for a youngish white man driving a white pick up truck.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Decoy Dolly
programme.desc: Late one evening in suburban Louisiana, a young carpenter offers a lift home to a women he’s met in a bar. But after riding off with the stranger in his truck, Andre disappears into the night.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Who Killed the Flower Girl
programme.desc: On July 1st 1996, 36-year-old Diana Goldston is abducted by a burly man in a pick-up truck in broad daylight outside the Denton, Texas bar where she sells flowers.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Rachel Domas
programme.desc: Can a veteran psychic and a rookie cop crack a case of a missing fourteen-year-old girl? Rachel Domas misses her school bus and walks the 3 miles home. She’s never seen again.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Fatal Extraction
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania factory-town is terrified when Dr. John Yelenic, a much-loved, local dentist is found murdered in his home.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Murder Too Close to Home
programme.desc: When a swimming instructor, Mae Wentz, is brutally stabbed to death in her Boynton Beach home, Florida police comb the bloody crime scene for clues.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Mick Hughes
programme.desc: Landlord and pub owner Mick Hughes is brutally attacked in his living quarters situated above his bar, he bleeds to death. Discovered by employees 48 hours later, the police start gathering evidence.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: How Dark the Woods
programme.desc: A lazy day at the lake in upstate New York turns to panic when a five year-old boy disappears into the woods.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: I can't rationlise it!!

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Twist of Hate
programme.desc: When Dawn is ready to move on from her partner, he begins a vicious campaign of stalking and threatening both her reputation and her life.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Wolf In Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: Judy Phillips is recovering from kidney disease when she meets a handsome young man. But, soon, he reveals a taste for cruelty.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Web of Destruction
programme.desc: Mai Hlee Xiong is a beauty pageant contestant fresh out of college. A stalker is watching her every move and he'll stop at nothing to defame her good reputation.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: A Mother's Nightmare
programme.desc: When Jessica takes out a restraining order against her ex-husband, he vows to get her back. When police won't protect her, Jessica is left to face the horrors that will change her life forever.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: Vernetta is stalked by her abusive ex-husband, Richard, after she kicks him out of the house. When Richard threatens murder, Vernetta must face the fight of her life.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Muse For Murder
programme.desc: A troubled young man becomes enraged when he is rejected by the love of his life. Craving her long brown hair, he rapes and murders women that remind him of her.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Like A Hurricane
programme.desc: On the day of a hurricane, a charmer with a dark side rolls into a rural Alabama town in order to find temporary work, cleaning up from the storm. No one knows about his dangerous past..

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Baseline Killer
programme.desc: A brazen serial rapist and killer terrorizes the women of Phoenix, Arizona over a few short months. He eludes capture, his assaults growing bolder, but does not count on sophisticated police technology to foil his plans.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Schoolboy Shooter
programme.desc: A fourteen-year old freshman is bullied at school resulting in a fatal shooting...

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Fake Rockefeller
programme.desc: A human chameleon infiltrates L.A.’s flashy scene and entraps a famous actress into his dark world and web of lies.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Death And Dismemberment
programme.desc: A woman makes a horrifying discovery of human remains in the driveway of a suburban Hamilton, ON home. When the homeowner is arrested, he refuses to talk but what police uncover will expose a dark history of violence and murder..

programme.title: Very Bad Men: A Deadly Burning Passion
programme.desc: In 2003, Washington DC is on fire. A serial arsonist is getting sexual gratification by setting fires across the city. As the death toll rises, fire investigators race to catch the notorious firebug before he can kill again.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Masters of Greed
programme.desc: Two businessmen commit the biggest fraud in BC history and leave thousands of retirees and single mothers penniless

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Last Call Killer
programme.desc: In the early 1990’s, gay men are being murdered after being last seen in Rockland County, NY’s upscale gay bars. Their bodies have been found, dismembered in garbage bags, along New Jersey’s roadways. The murders go unsolved until seven years later.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Haunted
programme.desc: Sam Christie has been plagued by a horrible secret since he was a boy. After seeing ghosts of the past and suffering terrible nightmares, he starts realizing the truth

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Don Juan of Con
programme.desc: An adoring and unsuspecting wife discovers her perfect husband is an imposter, a fraudster and a bigamist

programme.title: Very Bad Men: A Wolf Among Sheep
programme.desc: A popular teen girl disappears into thin air in Elkhart, Indiana. But when her naked body is discovered a week later, police must find her killer before fear rips the quiet community apart

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Devil's Disciple
programme.desc: A conman posing as a preacher entices victims to a bogus farm with the promise of good jobs and then hunts them down like wild animals..

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Intimate Sacrifice
programme.desc: A twisted blackmailer extorts sexual bribes from women who are willing to sacrifice their dignity to protect those they love..

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Lady Killer
programme.desc: Investigators find the parallels between the two cases troubling: two young, isolated and vulnerable Guyanese women, two deaths in strange circumstances, two life insurance policies. Will Mohammed Khan escape justice again?

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The body of a woman is found floating next to a dock. The case takes the detectives into a sinister world from which few come out unharmed.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: On October 1, 2000, 10-year-old Heather Thomas disappeared from her father’s Cloverdale townhouse. Ertmoed is arrested and confesses that he lured Heather into his apartment on the pretext of showing her pictures of birds and strangles her to death.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mortal Passion
programme.desc: In early April 2000, two students discover the lifeless body of a young woman on the edge of a river. The victim has wounds on her neck, but a murder weapon is not found at the scene. Investigators find a piece of paper in the victim’s pant pocket.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Devil in the Woods
programme.desc: On June 24th 1990, the day after a rock festival near Roseisle in Manitoba, 16 year-old Brigitte Grenier is found lying dead in a stream in the middle of the woods. The teenager’s body shows signs of violence and sexual mutilations.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: Following the gruesome discovery of a skeleton transported by water on an island, several detectives are challenged as they seek to unravel the unsolved mystery of the woman with no name.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Lethal Investment
programme.desc: April 1999 in the Port of Quebec City, the "Spirit of Columbus" is moored at Pier 29. A worker sees a body floating at the base of the platform. The pathologist determines that the woman had been strangled. The case is becomes a murder.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Volcanoes
programme.desc: Volcanoes occupy a special place in our imagination. Stories of the destruction of the ancient Roman city of Pompeii continue to fascinate, while terrifying visions of exploding fire and molten rock play a key part in our nightmares.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Earthquakes
programme.desc: Deadly, highly destructive and impossible to predict the Earthquake is perhaps one of Mother Nature's most terrifying forces. They flatten entire cities, create mass homelessness, and take thousands of lives. Earthquakes are truly deadly disasters.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Tsunamis
programme.desc: In Japanese, Tsunami translates to “harbour wave.” They are unleashed when a major disturbance occurs underwater, creating a series of enormous, deadly swells.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Drought
programme.desc: Most parts of the world are liable to the horrors brought by lack of water. In the United States only hurricanes bring about more economic hardships. It is not only a lack of rain and high temperatures that causes drought.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Cyclones
programme.desc: An intense area of low pressure that forms over warm tropical waters, tropical cyclones are responsible for some of the most catastrophic extreme weather events. Their deadly winds and torrential rain wreak destruction on an unprecedented scale.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hurricane
programme.desc: Linking up with legendary storm chaser Jim Leonard, George flies to Jamaica to track Hurricane Dean. George then travels to Nova Scotia to experience the even bigger turmoil of Hurricane Noel at the iconic Maritime village of Peggy's Cove.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Java: Land of Fire
programme.desc: In the Pacific Ring of Fire island of Java, George explores new ash eruptions from Anak Krakatau, whose 1883 eruption shook the world. He travels to Merapi and descends into Kawah Ijen to explore the world's largest lake of sulfuric acid.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Under Pressure
programme.desc: After submarine exploration of Grand Cayman Island, George dives with Canadian Armed Forces' experimental deep pressure unit. With explorers Chris Harvey-Clark and Phil Nuytten he investigates newly discovered "Black Smoker" deep sea vents.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Costa Rica
programme.desc: George explores the volcanoes of Costa Rica with an international team of scientists, rafts down white water rivers in full flood, rappels down raging waterfalls, and handles some of deadliest snakes this tropical country has to offer.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Empty Quarter
programme.desc: The Empty Quarter is a windswept area of sand dunes. In a tiny corner of this vast desert lies Dubai, a glitzy ultra-modern playground. George heads out from Abu Dhabi on a 4W safari to see both sides of this corner of Arabia.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Eco-Disasters
programme.desc: Uzbekistan's Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, shrunk to 1/6 its previous size; a Crimea mountain carved into a submarine base; Chernobyl nuclear site reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Angry Planet: West Coast Winter Weather
programme.desc: On Canada's rugged West Coast, George ice-climbs a frozen waterfall, uses ski-skins to climb Mt.Garibaldi to an alpine lake, visits a storm-watching lodge on British Columbia's Long Beach, home of winter surfing and massive Pacific storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Waterspouts
programme.desc: In the Florida Keys, George uses a motorboat, a van and small plane to get up close to waterspouts - the nautical cousins of tornadoes. He also meets some of the 25 million alligators that live in the Sunshine State.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Highway to Hail
programme.desc: George and his team head into "bears' cage", looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones in Texas and Oklahoma. Their storm chasing vehicles don't look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.
programme.sub-title: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds

programme.title: Naked Science: Snowball Earth
programme.desc: There is a theory that scientists once dismissed as absurd - that long ago the Earth became so cold every inch of it was entombed in ice.

programme.title: Naked Science: Super Flares - Could They Cause Mass Extinction?
programme.desc: Superflares are amongst the greatest events of the Universe. These magnetic explosions can release energy millions of times greater than atomic bombs. They produce streams of highly energetic particles which can be highly destructive to life.
programme.sub-title: Super Flares - Could They Cause Mass Extinction?

programme.title: Naked Science: Diamonds
programme.desc: Naked Science follows the story of a diamond from the creation of carbon inside the heart of a dying sun, through to the cutting of a diamond mine in South Africa.

programme.title: Naked Science: Magnetic Earth
programme.desc: The Earth hurtles through space protected by an invisible force field, known as a magnetosphere.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: El Niño
programme.desc: It is estimated that between 1997 and 1998, “El Niño” took the lives of 24,000 people and created a startling $34 billion (US) in economic damages worldwide. In this episode we explain what “El Niño” is.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Tornadoes
programme.desc: The Tornado is one of Mother Nature’s most extraordinary phenomena. These intense, rapidly rotating columns of air can attain wind speeds of more than 480 kilometres per hour, and have been witnessed on every continent except Antarctica.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Avalanches
programme.desc: We tend to think of disasters as inevitable - but often Mother Nature gives us vital clues which we foolishly ignore or overlook. This episode will take a close look at avalanches and what we can learn about how, where, and why they strike.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: General Lee Considered
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: The Thunder from Down Under
programme.desc: When the local junkyard closes its doors Mark and Dougie have to rescue an old friend from the earliest days of Graveyard Carz. But their journey appears to be cursed by a sudden increase in thunder and lightning.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Taming a 1971 Challenger R/T
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Allysa's Billboard Hit
programme.desc: Allysa and Dougie finish building out the 440 engine for the 1968 GTX currently in assembly. And Allysa and Mark begin one of the most difficult decal applications a White Billboard for the 1970 Cuda' Convertible.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: From Roadrunner to Superbird
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Mopar or No Car
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: The Reel Life of GYC
programme.desc: Since 2012 Graveyard Carz has become synonymous with high-quality Mopar Restoration. And the show continues to grow with new fans and new builds each and every year. We pull the curtain back to reveal some of the cast and crew's favorite moments.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Parking In-Violetion
programme.desc: In our second to last episode of the season the ghouls shift into high gear to make progress on our In-Violet 1971 'Cuda Convertible. And work begins on our SEMA 2019 build!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Tiny Dancer Strikes Again!
programme.desc: Mark illuminates the ultra-rare option of Mopar sunroofs while the team tackles the task of restoring a real M51 power sunroof 1969 Charger R/T SE sunroof.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: This is Boring
programme.desc: With the shop already filled with restorations Mark takes a road-trip to Boring Oregon to look at a new restoration project. When it turns out to be an unusually well-preserved muscle-car Mark works outside his comfort zone to close the deal.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Mark's Little Demon
programme.desc: The famous 1971 Mr. Norm's Dodge Demon 340 6-pack is cruising through the shop.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: "Yeah it's hopped up to over 160"
programme.desc: The 1970 Challenger Vanishing Point tribute car is back! A major dream project for Mark is the creation of a series of Alpine White 1970 Dodge Challenger R/T tribute cars modeled after the iconic Mopar featured in the film "Vanishing Point".

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Memento Mori
programme.desc: Graveyard Carz has restored its fair share of 1971 'Cudas so what makes this 1971 Hemi Shaker 'Cuda so different? Don't worry we won't ruin the surprise. This is the first time in Graveyard Carz broadcasts that the car will be revealed backwards!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Hellephant in the Room
programme.desc: At SEMA 2018 Mark was gifted the first third-generation 426 Hemi-Crate engine by Mopar and now must decide which car he's going to install it in for SEMA 2019. Meanwhile Will begins paint-prep on a beautiful Rallye Red 1970 Plymouth 'Cuda.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: The Road Running Home
programme.desc: Good news from Mark's daughter Allyssa! She's pregnant with her fourth child and this time Mark will have a grandson! Unfortunately Mark needs to find a replacement to help with his pet project "The Autopsy Report".

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: One for the Road Movie
programme.desc: The Vanishing Point Challenger has not disappeared from view. After years of gathering rust in the Graveyard this 1970 Alpine White Challenger R/T tribute car has been cleaned up and has received most of its sheet metal.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: The Ice-Trey 200
programme.desc: To celebrate the 200th episode of Graveyard Carz Mark and the Ghoulz visit a private automotive museum!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Dude, Where's Allysa's Car?
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: More than a Number
programme.desc: Tune in to the season finale of Graveyard Carz and find out what made this season one for the record books! On this special episode Mark and the Ghoulz count and catalog every significant restoration from the very first 1970 Road Runner in season 1

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Firepower Operation
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Chickadee Returns
programme.desc: Chickadee (Barbara Nichols) returns with a new act.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Are Overdrawn
programme.desc: Jed’s bank statement is switched with an unemployed actor with a similar name.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Go Hollywood
programme.desc: Jake and Opal Clampett are continuing to stay at the Clampett mansion. Jethro and Elly both decide they want to get in the movie business, and the two get help from Jake and Opal.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Turkey Day
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale’s turkey escapes into the Clampett household and finds a home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Garden Party
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale is having a garden party and tells the Clampetts not to attend. However, they misunderstand and think she wants them to come.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly Needs A Maw
programme.desc: Jed visits the bank to tell Drysdale that he plans to go back home to look for a wife. When Mrs. Fenwick visits, Drysdale decides that she would be perfect.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Get Culture
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: A Man For Elly
programme.desc: Granny loves one TV Western star, Quirt Manly, and Granny already has him set up for Elly May, because she knows he is probably the only who can tame the vine-swinging girl.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Giant Jackrabbit
programme.desc: A kangaroo invades the world of the Clampetts, but Granny thinks it’s a big rabbit.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Girl From Home
programme.desc: An old beau shows up to marry Jethro for his money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Lafe Lingers On
programme.desc: Lafe Crick returns to the Clampett mansion looking to get rich off of Jed's money. He tries to get a job at the bank guarding Jed's money, only to get a few million of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Race For Queen
programme.desc: Bob Cummings plays himself and must judge a beauty contest.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Strike Oil
programme.desc: In the first episode Jed Clampett strikes oil, sells his land and moves to a 35 room mansion in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Getting Settled
programme.desc: When they arrive at their new mansion they are mistaken for backwoods servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Meanwhile, Back At The Cabin
programme.desc: The Clampetts find that the comforts of the mansion do not always compare with the comforts of their shack back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Meet Mrs Drysdale
programme.desc: When Mr. Drysdale describes Mrs. Drysdale as being a hypochondriac, the Clampetts assume she must be a drunk.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Buys Stock
programme.desc: When Drysdale suggest buying good stock, Jed quickly buys some cows, pigs and chickens. Meanwhile, Granny has plans to sober up Mrs. Drysdale, who the family believes is a lush.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Trick Or Treat
programme.desc: The Clampetts are feeling homesick so they decide to go visit their new neighbours. Little do they know, it is Halloween, a holiday they have never heard of.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Servants
programme.desc: Drysdale attempts another step insocial renovation of the Clampetts by lending them his servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jethro Goes To School
programme.desc: A private school teacher is shocked to learn that her new fifth grade student is Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly's First Date
programme.desc: Elly May is set up with Sonny Drysdale. When they meet, the date ends very soon, after Sonny tries to kiss Elly’s hand, but she thinks he is trying to bite her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Pygmalion And Elly
programme.desc: Sonny Drysdale plays Pygmalion and Julius Caesar as he resumes his courtship of Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly Races Jethrine
programme.desc: Will Sonny propose to Elly? Can Pearl marry her daughter off? Utter confusion ensues.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Great Feud
programme.desc: Sonny jilts Elly and the Clampetts load their shootin’ irons for a match with the Drysdales.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Home For Christmas
programme.desc: When Granny, Uncle Jed, Elly May and Jethro decide to return to the country for the holidays, they discover airline travel.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Home for Christmas, the Clampetts help Pearl woo Mr. Brewster, a big oil company executive.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Rescues Pearl
programme.desc: Pearl attempts to snag Mr. Brewster until he makes a ridiculous public announcement.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Back To Californy
programme.desc: Jed is confronted with too many cooks when he invites Pearl and Jethrine to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed's Dilemma
programme.desc: Jed takes the family on a sight seeing tour of Beverly Hills to cool a feud between Granny and Pearl.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage
programme.desc: Drysdale’s marriage is threatened when he gets a new housekeeper while his wife is away.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly's Animals
programme.desc: Police and Elly’s animals converge on the Clampett estate when Pearl starts giving yodeling lessons.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Throws A Wing Ding
programme.desc: Two of Pearl’s ardent suitors come to visit her in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Plays Solomon
programme.desc: Granny’s plan to stop Pearl’s yodeling backfires when the police come and find her still.

programme.title: The New Frontier: WEBB OF LIFE
programme.desc: The James Webb Space Telescope is now operational. Launched aboard an Arianne 5 the 10-billion-dollar spacecraft has deployed successfully and reached its orbit around the Sun.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Shore To Shore
programme.desc: Our seafaring nature has translated well to the space age, seeking to sail out into the unknown in search of riches of one kind or another.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Ice Giants
programme.desc: Beyond the asteroid belt lay the ice giants, some can be seen with the naked eye, others only glimpsed once by a passing probe.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Martian Attractions
programme.desc: The Latest in Martian exploration from orbit and on the ground, new sources of water and planetary dust storms are a few of the stories unfolding on to the Red Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Fresh Eyes
programme.desc: Two new space telescopes are in orbit and completing their shakedown; Gaia and TESS they too will be joined by the James Webb Telescope.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Danger, Astreroids Ahead
programme.desc: The question often rises is the cost of space exploration really worth it? Could the money be better spent elsewhere.

programme.title: The New Frontier: First Light
programme.desc: For an instrument first developed as recently as the 17th century, the telescope has travelled a long way.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: In the world of astronomy, how do we overcome the limits imposed by our own eyesight? The universe comes alive by viewing the cosmos in infrared light to gamma radiation.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one Earth's closest neighbors, but for centuries it eluded astronomer's best efforts to learn its secrets. But that has changed thanks to missions like Mariner and most recently, Messenger.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.
programme.sub-title: The Giant Planets: Lords of Gravity / Outer Limits: Edge of the Solar System

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 1: The Solar System
programme.desc: This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see, how we can live in space and what science tells us about the past and the future as we journey inside out of space.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 8: Extravehicular Activity
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 4: Black Holes
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 2: Moons
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 5: Space Missions
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 3: Asteroids
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 6: Fermi paradox
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 7: The Milky Way
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Planet Makers
programme.desc: From the beginnings of our Solar System four and half billion years ago there remains tantalizing clues to its evolution; remnent debris: asteroids and comets.

programme.title: The New Frontier: OCEANS IN THE SKY
programme.desc: Juice and the Europa Clipper are two missions to our Solar System’s largest planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Return To The Moon
programme.desc: The Moon, our closest celestial companion. Our indispensible dance partner through the cosmos.

programme.title: The New Frontier: THE NEXT BIG LEAPS
programme.desc: Projects in the works. SunRISE, SPHEREx, NEOS and others, their mission to expand our knowledge of Earth, the surrounding space, Dark Matter, and the earliest galaxies. N

programme.title: RISING TIDES
programme.desc: The next generation of Earth observation satellites are now in place maintaining the continuity of long-term climate data, in particular the planets rising temperatures and related ocean levels.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Orbit
programme.desc: The International Space Station is undoubtedly the jewel in the crown of low Earth orbit; observation post, research lab and class room.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Getting There
programme.desc: Launching payloads into space is a very difficult task, historically rocket launches are the proverbial 'swords into ploughshares'.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Slingshot
programme.desc: Sending probes throughout the solar system is a mathematicians dream and an engineers nightmare, sling shotting probes around other planets to arrive at their destination.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Atmosphere
programme.desc: How do astronauts cope with living in space?

programme.title: The New Frontier: GIANTS IN THE DARK
programme.desc: Asteroids, the debris from the early solar system hold tantalizing clues to planetary formation. The spacecraft Psyche readies to study a unique metallic asteroid.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini: Docking and EVA - In the final phase of the Gemini program NASA struggles with docking and spacewalks. Curiosity Roving Mars - On the surface of Mars the Curiosity rover is changing the way we think about the red planet.
programme.sub-title: Project Gemini Docking, Mars Curiousity & Satellite Swarms

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Commences - Did Gemini give the US a lead in the space race? Venus Express - The last days of ESA's Venus probe. EMU - NASA's Extravehicular Mobility Unit. Deep Space Communications - ESA's worldwide network of giant dishes.
programme.sub-title: Project Gemini, Venus Express, EMU & Deep Space Communication

programme.title: Dragon Warriors
programme.desc: An evil wizard, Lord Tensley, seeks the hand and heart of the beautiful princess. When she refuses, he locks her away and releases a deadly dragon to terrorize the land. Starring: James Marsters, Kaitlin Doubleday, Luke Perry

programme.title: Set Up
programme.desc: After a diamond hand turns deadly Sonny seeks out his own revenge. When he finally comes face to face with the friend who betrayed him he will be forced to make a life changing choice.

programme.title: The Debt Collector
programme.desc: French is a martial artist that takes on a job as a mob debt collector in order to make ends meet. He does whatever it takes to chase down individuals until he meets a bartender that makes him question whether he should do the right thing.

programme.title: Operation: Endgame
programme.desc: Two rival teams of assassins. One killer day at the office. An all-star cast including Rob Corddry, Ellen Barkin, Zach Galifianakis, Ving Rhames, and Jeffrey Tambor fight to the death to be the last man standing in this hilarious action comedy!

programme.title: Hunt to Kill: Hunt to Kill
programme.desc: When Jim's (Steve Austin of TV's WWE) teenage daughter is kidnapped, he's forced to lead a band of ruthless killers into the wilderness to retrieve their share of a missing heist score.

programme.title: The Librarian: Quest for the Spear
programme.desc: As a means of finding the legendary book known as the Key of Solomon, Flynn pairs with a brainy archaeologist to first acquire the map legend. Unfortunately, they must elude the sinister General Samir and the ulterior plans of Flynn's uncle.

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: In a quest to find a lost colleague, a team of scientists find themselves deep underground in an ancient labyrinth, while trying to unearth a secret that has been buried for centuries.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Quest For Akhenatens Tomb

programme.sub-title: And The Quest For Akhenatens Tomb

programme.title: Bolo
programme.desc: Two convicts get freed from prison and become lawmen in a corrupt village.

programme.title: Felicia's Journey
programme.desc: A young woman leaves Ireland to find her boyfriend in England, and while there is helped by a man hiding unsettling secrets.

programme.title: Run The Tide
programme.desc: When their drug abusing mother is released from prison determined to rebuild their family, Rey kidnaps his younger brother Oliver and escapes their desert home for the California coast. Starring: Taylor Lautner, Nico Christou, Kenny Johnson

programme.title: The Tall Man
programme.desc: When her child goes missing, a mother looks to unravel the legend of the Tall Man, an entity who allegedly abducts children.

programme.title: Miss Meadows

programme.title: Gasoline Alley

programme.title: Misconduct
programme.desc: An ambitious lawyer is caught between a corrupt pharmaceutical executive and his firm's senior partner. When the case turns deadly, he must find the truth or lose everything.

programme.title: Bloodlines
programme.desc: In November 1999, Dr Colin Bouwer, the Head of Psychiatry at Otago Hospital, put a murderous plan into action. A perfect crime, until Andrew Bowers, a young consultant physician, stumbled upon the murder in process.

programme.title: Seduced By A Thief
programme.desc: When a security guard is blamed for the theft of a necklace, he tracks down the beautiful thief, only to be seduced into a world of diamond smuggling and double-cross.

programme.title: Encounter with Danger
programme.desc: As Jack leaves town for business, he seizes the opportunity to take Lori along so that they rekindle their relationship. But when he disappears, Lori discovers that Jack was about to reveal the corruption that exists within the company…

programme.title: We Have Your Husband
programme.desc: When her husband is kidnapped, Jayne is pushed to the limit to raise the ransom money that will guarantee his safe return. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Capricorn One

programme.title: Rise Of The Fellowship
programme.desc: What if The Lord of the Rings wasn’t just a story? What if it happened to you? Randall Dooley and his friends are outcasts at school, spending most of their time playing online games. After Randall is set up for a crime he didn’t commit.

programme.title: Prospect

programme.title: Project Nazi: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler promises to make Germany great again with his ambitious plans to create 22,000 kms of motorway and build one and half million “People’s Cars” every year.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Industry of War

programme.desc: A lonely 9 year old boy makes a new friend when he discovers a magical little man inside a cupboard, but when one of the man's spells goes awry, the boy's entire family is shrunk down to four inches in height.

programme.title: Knucklehead
programme.desc: After incurring a large debt with a local criminal ringleader, Eddie Sullivan creates a get-rich-quick scheme and enlists a gentle giant named Walter as his unwitting accomplice.

programme.title: Heaven Sent
programme.desc: Maire prays that her husband find the strength to let go of their 9 year marriage. Billy is asking that his wife receive the strength and wisdom to hold on. A 8-year-old runaway from heaven takes it upon herself to rekindle the romance that slipped away.

programme.title: Golden Shoes
programme.desc: A young boy captures the heart of the nation as he overcomes bullying, intolerance, and a dire home situation to pursue his dream of playing soccer.

programme.title: F.R.E.D.I.
programme.desc: Prepare for an adventure that's out of this world! When an intelligent, lovable robot, known as F.R.E.D.I., goes missing from a secret government research facility it's found by 15 year old James.

programme.title: The Adventures of Robo Rex
programme.desc: James Miller has only one friend in the world, his beloved Labrador Retriever, Rex. But when a strange capsule lands in the his backyard and a robot dog emerges, his life will never be the same.

programme.title: Cadia: The World Within
programme.desc: Devastated by the loss of their mother, three teens discover a mystical realm ruled by unseen forces and must overcome evil in the order to return home.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Caribbean: The Wild Side of Paradise
programme.desc: The Caribbean is a tropical paradise. From just a few meters wide, to hundreds of kilometers across, each of the over 7,000 islands are different, and each has its own unique wildlife.
programme.sub-title: Caribbean: The Wild Side of Paradise

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Sri Lanka: Monsoon Island
programme.desc: Lying like a teardrop in the Indian Ocean, Sri Lanka is an island that defies convention. Poised just six degrees above the equator, it's less than 75,000 km sq in size. But it has enough wildlife to rival a continent.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Amazon River Islands: The Floating Forest
programme.desc: The Anavilhanas and Mariua archipelagos are deep in the heart of the Amazon rainforest. Flooded for 6 months of the year, the islands are a fortress of submerged trees. / Vancouver island is the largest island off the west coast of North America.
programme.sub-title: Amazon River Islands: The Floating Forest

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia
programme.desc: How have Indonesia’s remote and mysterious islands become home to so many of the natural world’s most extraordinary giants? From a unique species of elephant, and the world’s longest snake, to a crab almost a metre wide that climbs trees

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia
programme.desc: Scattered across the warm South China Sea, Indonesia’s islands are a melting pot for evolution and diversity. Here, rich forests, rivers and coastlines have offered pockets of isolation, enabling animals to develop incredible behaviours and looks.

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia
programme.desc: Indonesia’s enduring heat provides energy for it’s reptilian residents to thrive, and so much so, they outnumber it’s mammalian inhabitants.

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia
programme.desc: The island chain of Indonesia is home to more active volcanoes than any other country in the world. Yet somehow, instead of posing a threat – this volcanic activity is a source of life

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia
programme.desc: Cloaked in tropical rainforest and warmed by clear blue seas Indonesia is a paradise. Although much of the island chain receives sporadic rain throughout the year, this alone wouldn’t be enough to sustain the region’s rich abundance of life.

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti: Journey
programme.desc: Follow the annual migration through more hazards and dangers.

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti: Protection
programme.desc: Animals use all sorts of strategies to protect their families and food from marauders.

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti: Water Worlds
programme.desc: Explore the rivers and lakes contained within the Serengeti eco-system and examine those whose lives are controlled by the presence -- or lack -- of life-giving water.

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti: The Hunt
programme.desc: "The Hunt" focuses on hunters and hunting, and the brutal ending of a life -- an act which sustains another’s. The hunt is by far the most dramatic event taking place on the plains of the Serengeti.

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti: Migration
programme.desc: Great herds take center stage as what’s at stake is revealed for those with no home but the ground they find themselves standing on. The herds run the gamut of predators, as well as pressures unique to this nomadic way of life.

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti: The Chase
programme.desc: "The Chase" focuses on Africa’s predators and how they hunt -- from cheetahs running down gazelles to lions taking on the mighty buffalo. Even the best hunters can be outrun and outwitted.

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti: Blood Kin
programme.desc: "Blood Kin" reveals more family strategies at work and the heavy price the young pay in hostile takeovers.

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti: Defense
programme.desc: "Defense" explores defensive strategies that include the most powerful instinct -- a mother’s love, which helps protect the next generation. This act of self-sacrifice, or risk of harm, typifies a mother’s defense of her offspring.

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti: River Giants
programme.desc: Explore the river environment of the enormous Nile crocodiles and hippopotamus.

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti: Rivals
programme.desc: See the animals of the Serengeti who seem to always be at war with each other. Species compete with each other over territories, and create ring fencing of these areas with scent marking.

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti: Competition
programme.desc: Explore the ever-present challenges presented by competing for food, mating rights and territory. The competitive spirit is shown in the hunt and the competition between predator and prey.

programme.title: Beautiful Serengeti: Family
programme.desc: Explore the many different concepts of family in the natural world. See how animals get together, raising of cubs and chicks, and learn how family bonds can determine an animal’s fate.

programme.title: Wildest Europe
programme.desc: From mountain to sea, and from scorching desert to Arctic tundra, Europe’s great wilderness contains a stunning and surprising explosion of life. Wildest Europe reveals the incredible beauty and diversity of wildlife in Europe’s major natural habitats.

programme.title: Wildest Europe
programme.desc: From mountain to sea, and from scorching desert to Arctic tundra, Europe’s great wilderness contains a stunning and surprising explosion of life. Wildest Europe reveals the incredible beauty and diversity of wildlife in Europe’s major natural habitats.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 2
programme.desc: Can proud Perth siblings Amanda and Blake turn their humble beginnings into a grand finale? Meanwhile, Josh’s table manners go from bad to worse as the homeschoolers refuse to learn a lesson.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 3
programme.desc: Family heritage is on the line as Karito and Ian showcase the food and fire of her native Colombia. But will their Latin fiesta become a fiasco?

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 4
programme.desc: Flight attendants Chris and Lesley are planning to deliver a first-class night on the Sunshine Coast.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 5
programme.desc: It’s MKR’s first Peruvian Instant Restaurant but will Andy and Ruby’s passion for their motherland get lost in translation?

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 6
programme.desc: In country Victoria, Mick and Jodie-Anne are all about serving champagne food on a beer budget.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 7
programme.desc: The knives come out as Sydney socialites Ibby and Romel step into the kitchen. Can these controversial game players deliver or will they make a stylish exit?

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 8
programme.desc: Teams have mixed expectations as they travel to Western Sydney for Josh and Austin’s Instant Restaurant. When the brutally honest brothers plate up, guests are left hangry and Manu’s just plain angry.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 9
programme.desc: The power to send our first team home is in the hands of eight new teams as Group 2 becomes guests and jury at the all-new MKR Restaurant. Whose MKR dream will end tonight?

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 10
programme.desc: What will Lisa and John do to see them enter the MKR hall of fame? Plus, the perfect strangers meet for the first time!

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 11
programme.desc: Bartending buddies Victor and G are hoping they’ve concocted the right mix for success. Will drawing on their unique heritage deliver harmonious scores or will their fusion cause confusion?

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 12
programme.desc: There’s no love lost between frenemies Pat and Bianca, but when the pressure’s on can their love for food shine through? Plus, the shocking faux pas that crushes Karolina!

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules Australia: Episode 13
programme.desc: The psychic and the cougar hope to conjure up a top-scoring menu. But when the cards fall, will they read fortune or failure?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Scent Of The Kill
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Crimes Of Passion
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Misplaced Loyalty
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Left At The Scene
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Loved To Death
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Natural Witness
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Impressions
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Coroner Investigator
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Web of Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives: The Unforgotten
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial Of The Century
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Marked For Death
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Burning Evidence
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead Men Do Talk
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murderous Attraction
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Encounter
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Flames Of Justice
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: Andromeda: Vault of the Heavens

programme.desc: While caught in a battle between two Nietzschean prides, the crew captures a hostile who claims that his pride possesses a map of the slipstream.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Illusion of Majesty

programme.title: Andromeda: Twilight of the Idols
programme.desc: The crew seeks for a lost colony of Nietzscheans and discovers another crew that has been secretly helping them.

programme.desc: A message from a collector sends Dylan on a quest to rescue a hostage and find the remains of the Commonwealth fleet.

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.desc: A wrong turn in the slipstream leads Andromeda to a prison riot.

programme.title: Andromeda: Machinery of the Mind
programme.desc: The Andromeda crew steps up to find out who killed a group of scientists.

programme.title: Andromeda: Exalted Reason, Resplendent Daughter
programme.desc: The crew is hired to rescue a princess from a notorious outlaw, but it is soon revealed that she was trying to escape murder at her father's hand.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Torment, the Release
programme.desc: The Collectors now control the Commonwealth and put the Andromeda crew on trial.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Spider's Stratagem
programme.desc: The Andromeda discovers a shipment of bio-armor.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: 54 year old Simon Buis was savagely beaten and kicked to death in an Auckland park in 1980 by persons unknown. To this day, his killers have evaded capture.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Girl in The Ditch
programme.desc: When 12 year old Agnes Ali'iva'a drowned in a ditch in 1992, the police initially thought her death was accidental. It was four years before public and political pressure forced police to re-investigate her death.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: Described as a brutal execution, 46-year-old grandmother Chattrice Maihi-Carroll was found naked, stabbed to death in her New Zealand home in 2008. There were multiple suspects and everything seemed resolved following the arrest of a neighbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken Out
programme.desc: Was Donovan Reidy deliberately run down and left to die? In 1995, 23-year-old Donovan Reidy was at a party when he got into a fight. A short while later, his bloodied body was found on the side of a major New Zealand highway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Lie of the Land
programme.desc: Sue Nicholson and Deb Webber investigate one of the most complex and intriguing cases ever featured - did Waikato man Jason Dark commit suicide or was he murdered, as his family believes?

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of 53-year-old, Cynthia Greenwood-Smith, to unravel the lies and discover the grim truth surrounding her disappearance from her Gold Coast home in 2001.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Vanishing Point
programme.desc: In 2003, 32-year-old mother of three Sara Neithe vanished from the Hauraki Plains. Neither Sara nor her car have been seen since. Police suspect that Sara has been murdered but without a crime scene, they have been unable to advance the case.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Blood Money
programme.desc: Psychics Kelvin Cruickshank (NZ) and Deb Webber (Aus) investigate the unsolved murder of Lower Hutt pensioner 91 year old George Engelbrecht. In 1979, a burglar broke into George's home and beat the old man to death in his bed.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: A Bump in the Night
programme.desc: In 1980, six-year-old Alicia O'Reilly was raped and murdered in her bed, while her sister slept less than a metre away, and her mother sleeping across the hallway.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Patient Killer
programme.desc: In 1976, thirteen-year-old schoolgirl Tracey Ann Patient was plucked off Auckland's Great North Road. The following morning, her body was found dumped 16 km away in the Waitakere Ranges, having been strangled with a pantyhose tourniquet.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Seeking Siegfried
programme.desc: Katikati man Siegfried Newman disappeared on February 25, 2008, after he had dropped his sons Thomas, 9, and Oliver, 7, at Pahoia School. Police carried out a three-day search but found no sign of him.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: Our new team of “ Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to unmask the killer – or killers – of vivacious New Zealand hairdresser Paula Brown who was plucked from Sydney’s downtown after a night out with friends.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: In 1957, nine-year-old Peter Boland was on holiday having the time of his life on a remote farm in New Zealand when he simply vanished without a trace. Peter’s older brother Gavin Boland, a self-confessed sceptic, turns to Sensing Murder’s psychics.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Long Way Home
programme.desc: 25-year-old Te Puke woman Judy Yorke was a devoted single mum who adored her kids. When she missed her daughter’s fourth birthday party, her family knew something was terribly wrong and reported her missing.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Night Caller: Eric Edgar Cooke
programme.desc: In 1959, the carefree culture of Perth changed forever when a plague of crime hit the city. By early 1963, the crime wave had escalated to serial murder.
programme.sub-title: The Night Caller: Eric Edgar Cooke

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Devil Inside: John Ernest Cribb
programme.desc: A chilling investigation of John Ernest Cribb, who on August 11, 1978 broke into the home of the Connell's. On a winter’s afternoon, Valda Connell and her four-year-old son Damien arrived home after having collected ten-year-old Sally from school.
programme.sub-title: The Devil Inside: John Ernest Cribb

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Greenough Family Massacre
programme.desc: The small hamlet of Greenough, near Geraldton in Western Australia, some 400 kilometres north of Perth, will forever be associated with one the most horrific murders in Australian criminal history.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Anita Cobby Murder
programme.desc: In February 1986, nurse Anita Cobby, a former entrant in the Miss Australia quest, is walking home from Blacktown station in Sydney's outer-western suburbs. A Holden sedan pulls up and Anita is dragged into the vehicle.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Kid for Ransom / Tears for Daniel
programme.desc: We examine two notorious abduction cases. The first case is the Graeme Thorne ransom kidnapping at Bondi in 1960. Thorne, aged eight, was the son of winners of the Sydney Opera House Lottery.
programme.sub-title: Kid for Ransom / Tears for Daniel

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Evil Heart: The Murder of Donna Wheeler
programme.desc: The bloodied, semi-naked body of 30-year-old Donna Wheeler is discovered by her estranged husband Keith Bond and 12-year-old son.
programme.sub-title: Evil Heart: The Murder of Donna Wheeler

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Assassination of John Newman
programme.desc: John Paul Newman was a member of the New South Wales state parliament and a member of the seat of Cabramatta.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Predator: Leonard John Fraser
programme.desc: Serial killer Leonard Fraser was suspected of killing at least five women over a 17 year period but took the complete truth about his life of crime to his grave.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Wanda Beach Murders / The Beaumont Children Mystery
programme.desc: In 1965, when Australian teenage culture was centred on sun, sand, and surf, the nation was shocked by the brutal bashing, rape and murder of two 15-year-old girls in the sand hills at Sydney's Wanda Beach.
programme.sub-title: The Wanda Beach Murders / The Beaumont Children Mystery

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Headless Body: The Kim Barry Murder
programme.desc: In 1981, the headless and fingerless body of 19-year-old Kim Narelle Barry was found dumped in the bush at a mountain lookout near Wollongong, south of Sydney.
programme.sub-title: Headless Body: The Kim Barry Murder

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Hunt for a Killer: The Claremont Murders
programme.desc: This chilling CIA episode details the long and difficult investigation which began with the disappearance of 18-year-old secretary Sarah Spiers from a night club in the up-market Perth suburb of Claremont on Australia Day 1996.
programme.sub-title: Hunt for a Killer: The Claremont Murders

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Night of Terror: The Bega Schoolgirls
programme.desc: On the 6th October 1997, 14-year-old Lauren Barry and 16-year-old Nicole Collins disappeared while walking along a road near their home town of Bega, on the New South Wales south coast.
programme.sub-title: Night of Terror: The Bega Schoolgirls

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Contract to Kill / The Mornington Monster
programme.desc: Crime Investigation Australia has conducted a major investigation which reveals the inside story of the Megan Kalajzich murder and the extraordinary police investigation which will rock the Harbour City's elite to the core.
programme.sub-title: Contract to Kill / The Mornington Monster

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Moorhouse Horrors / The Call Girl Killing
programme.desc: We investigate the story of David and Catherine Birnie, Australia's most sadistic husband and wife killing team, who tortured, raped and murdered four women in 1986.
programme.sub-title: The Moorhouse Horrors / The Call Girl Killing

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Kimberley Killer
programme.desc: Seven years after the disappearance of baby Azaria Chamberlain at Ayers rock, long before the murder of Peter Falconio on a remote stretch of highway in the Australian outback and two years before Ivan Milat begins his reign of backpacker murders.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Gonzales Family Murders
programme.desc: On July 10, 2001, Sef Gonzales murdered his sister Clodine, 18, mother Mary Loiva Josephine, 43, and his father Teddy, 46, in their North Ryde home.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: No More Grannies / The Granny Killer
programme.desc: We delve into the twisted mind of one of Australia's most prolific serial murderers. John Wayne Glover - The Granny Killer, was truly an evil man.
programme.sub-title: No More Grannies / The Granny Killer

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole plan competing weddings for a lesbian couple.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole must take care of a toddler, as well as throw a party for his second birthday.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole take a break from household chores and go on a family vacation.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole are paired with a hard-to-please husband.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole visit an artistic family with varied talents.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris can’t stand to spend another day as a housewife and hires an impersonator to take her place, giving Nicole an opportunity to exact her revenge.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris Hilton and Nicole Richie say goodbye to their jet-setting lifestyle in Los Angeles, and move in with the Ledings, a family in Altus, Arkansas.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole are hired to work at a dairy farm operated by Albert’s no-nonsense friend, but after tiring of the hard work and smell, they head for a nearby hot tub… and end up getting fired.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole are hired to work at a fast-food restaurant, but they’re bored and frustrated by the demands of the job, and soon rebel by pulling pranks during each of their assignments; when the Ledings reprimand them, the girls just go out dancing.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole agree to be honorary co-chairs of the Springtime Gala, but instead of working at the gala, they engage in their usual shocking behavior; the Ledings are embarrassed, and everyone in town is gossiping about Paris and Nicole.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: The girls go to work for a cattle auctioneer, but when they’re sent to buy cattle feed, they charge several other items without permission; the auctioneer comes after them for the money, and the girl try to lie their way out of the debt.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole finally get a job they enjoy: working at a gas station, where there are plenty of guys to flirt with; but a confrontation erupts when Albert and Janet tell the girls to stay away from the small town boys, and the girls disobey them.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole reminisce about their month in Altus, make amends, and say goodbye to the people they’ve come to know before returning to Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Leeza Gibbons hosts a look back at Paris’ and Nicole’s stay in Altus, Arkansas, as the girls reunite with the Leding family in front of a studio audience.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole depart from Miami Beach toward their first destination, the Batten Family Ranch.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole get jobs at Weeki Wachee Springs in Florida and play a surprising game of hide-and-seek with their boss's daughter.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole work as maids at the Caliente Nudist Colony and learn the meaning of the word "termination."

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: While staying with a host family, Nicole butts heads with their oldest son and decides to give him a taste of his own medicine.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: In the swamplands of Louisiana, Paris and Nicole meet their next host family and make a big impression after taking their daughter on a shopping spree; the women get jobs trapping crawfish.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: A stop in Texas brings Paris and Nicole to their new host family; the women convince the Lutz-Carillos boys to sneak out with them to go tanning.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole adjust to a rule against profanity in the household of their new hosts, devout members of a gospel choir; the pair get jobs with a minor league baseball team.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: The cross-country journey takes Paris and Nicole to Texas, where they try to help the host family's teenage son with his homework and take jobs at a local hair salon.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole stop at a ranch in Texas, where they give the father tips on being romantic with his wife; the pair get jobs at the local sheriff's station but their wild antics do not impress the boss.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Paris and Nicole work on a cattle drive in Texas but take matters into their own hands when they discover the herd is going to the slaughter.

programme.title: The Simple Life
programme.desc: Never-before-aired footage augments commentary by families and employers who hosted Paris and Nicole.

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: The Simple Life

programme.title: The Simple Life
